sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44028" key="eu)qugnwmi/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐθῠ-γνωμίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n44028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">witness who gives direct evidence</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
